recommendations.title: Sweet November

recommendations.title: Pride and Glory
recommendations.overview: A saga centered on a multi-generational family of New York City Police officers. The family's moral codes are tested when Ray Tierney, investigates a case that reveals an incendiary police corruption scandal involving his own brother-in-law. For Ray,

recommendations.title: The Batman
recommendations.overview: In his second year of fighting crime, Batman uncovers corruption in Gotham City that connects to his own family while facing a serial killer known as the Riddler.

recommendations.title: The Accountant
recommendations.overview: As a math savant uncooks the books for a new client, the Treasury Department closes in on his activities and the body count starts to rise.

recommendations.title: The Accountant²

recommendations.title: Ratsasan
recommendations.overview: A serial killer is murdering school girls, and a newbie cop has to track him down before the victim count increases.

recommendations.title: Angela's Christmas
recommendations.overview: A trip to church with her family on Christmas Eve gives young Angela an extraordinary idea. A heartwarming tale based on a story by Frank McCourt.

recommendations.title: Serpico
recommendations.overview: New York cop Frank Serpico blows the whistle on the rampant corruption in the force only to have his comrades turn against him.

recommendations.title: Woman on the Run
